title: Fractional Product Owner
description: Your translator between business and engineering. I turn your requirements into dev-ready specs, manage the backlog, and speak fluent developer with your team or vendors — so nothing gets lost in translation.

faq.q: What does a fractional product owner do?
faq.a: I act as your product owner on a part-time basis: gathering requirements, writing specs and user stories, prioritizing the backlog, and representing you in conversations with developers or vendors.

faq.q: Do you write the code yourself?
faq.a: No — I focus on making sure the right things get built. If you need a dev team, I can help you brief, evaluate, and manage one.
